expectations.evidence: File uses free-form markdown with headings (# Product Requirement Document: ConsultConnect), not product "..." { structured syntax
Problem statement is split into 'For Companies' and 'For Consultants' bullet lists; no situation/complication/question structure
4 personas defined under section 4: Persona 1 (Hiring Manager), Persona 2 (Procurement/Legal), Persona 3 (Freelance Consultant), Persona 4 (Platform Administrator)
Section 3 'Goals (First 18 Months)' table has 7 goals each with Metric and Target columns (e.g. 'Registered consultants' target 5,000)
Section 5 'Out of Scope (V1)' lists 6 items including managed services, team composition, payroll integration, etc.
No assumptions section found in the document
Section 12 'Risks and Mitigations' table lists 6 risks (cold start, disintermediation, regulatory complexity, etc.)
Section 14 'Release Plan' defines 4 phases: MVP (Months 1-4), Growth (5-8), Scale (9-14), Expansion (15-18)
